channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Web Browser (JCEF) - Mon Apr 20 15:00:29 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides web browser integration based on JCEF, a framework for embedding Chromium-based browsers in Java applications.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 63 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.modules.jcef
